items.title: Show HN: Bash4LLM+ – A lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper for LLM APIs
items.summary: Bash4LLM is a single-file Bash wrapper for interacting with LLMs from the terminal. I created it because I wanted something simple that worked without installing Python, Node, or any other runtime. It uses only Bash, curl, and jq. You can send prompts, start a small chat, process files line by line, stream output, and save session metadata in JSON format. I tried to make it safe and predictable: no use of the system /tmp, no use of eval.
items.author: kamaludu

items.title: Show HN: NanoEuler – GPT-2 scale model in pure C/CUDA from scratch
items.summary: Hi everyone, I started working on nanoeuler after the ban of anthropic's fable because my ambition and dream is to work in the AI field in anthropic. The two interesting reasons that led me to create nanoeuler were (1) interfacing with llm does not mean understanding how they are composed and (2), working on llm with a very low-level layer to understand the correlation between parameters and data and growth of the model and how the GPU works and how some layers can be optimized.

items.summary: Last week, we asked Electrek readers a simple whether they believed that Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, after becoming the world’s first trillionaire, would finally make good on the ambitious promises he spent years making about accelerating sustainable energy, delivering unsupervised full self driving, building useful humanoid robots, and ultimately making humanity a multiplanetary species. After more than 3,300 responses, here’s what you told us.

items.summary: Japanese telecommunications operator KDDI Corporation disclosed a data breach where threat actors gained access to one of its email systems used by five other internet service providers (ISPs) in the country. [...]

items.title: DSpark: Speculative decoding을 활용한 LLM 추론 가속화 [pdf]
items.summary: DSpark: 준자기회귀(semi-autoregressive) 생성과 신뢰도 스케줄링을 결합한 추측 디코딩(speculative decoding) 프레임워크 병렬 드래프터(parallel drafter) 가 한 번의 순전파로 긴 토큰 블록을 제안하지만 토큰 간 의존성 부재로 후반부 수락률 급감(acceptance decay)...
items.content: DSpark: 준자기회귀(semi-autoregressive) 생성과 신뢰도 스케줄링을 결합한 추측 디코딩(speculative decoding) 프레임워크 병렬 드래프터(parallel drafter) 가 한 번의 순전파로 긴 토큰 블록을 제안하지만 토큰 간 의존성 부재로 후반부 수락률 급감(acceptance decay)...
